Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite its simple appearance,[n]the soup has a complex flavor[n]that's enhanced by the noodles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Damn, this really is some bomb ramen. How could I ever leave this city!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Ms. Kanou must be in Kyushu by now. I wonder if she had her wedding already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}{f 5 13 2 5 101}You really don't you have anything to say to me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Nothing inspiring or encouraging?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Anything? Dude, you gotta learn when to say the right words if you want to land yourself a girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}And you know what else? My favorite show had its finale, and I didn't even notice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}My mind was really on one track for a while, huh? Kinda funny in a weird way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}That egg's all I got in this world, man! Hand it over or else![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We chatted for a while...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Man, it's always a blast hanging out with you. That said... I still want a girlfriend![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_009_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You don't know when to give up...
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Want me to find you a girl?

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 2 5 101}Hell no! Men and women can't help but be attracted to each other. That's just biology, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}C'mon, I just dropped some serious knowledge there. See how much I've been studying?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 2 15 101}Yeah, dude! And you can be my wingman! Let's go pick up some chicks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Sounds like I should be making more surprise visits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've been doing some thinking after everything that went down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}When Emiri left, I was sad, sure. But on top of that, I felt... really dumb.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Did I really love Emiri, or did I just love the idea of dating a teacher?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}What I did figure out is... you're a true friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}We're talking about the heart, dude! Don't you feel it? Just shut up and feel it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Ugh, dammit! Why do I say such embarrassing things!? God, I'm such a dumbass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. *If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I made it for you. Figured you could pull it off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Your fashion sense is kinda meh, so I wanted to help you out. I mean, that's what best friends do, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika told me I'm his best friend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong bond with Tomochika...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Magician Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Futsunushi{f 0 1 27}, the warrior god![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Man! I worked up an appetite acting all weird around you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika and I spent hours hanging out.[n]{f 1 1}
